weddingParty.name: Sydni Edgington
weddingParty.description: Sydni and Maddie met as student employees in WiSE at Iowa State and have been close friends ever since.

weddingParty.name: Nathan Wilson
weddingParty.description: Nathan is Nick’s friend, Vermeer coworker, and former roommate.

weddingParty.name: Elizabeth Cardey
weddingParty.description: Lizzy is Maddie’s cousin and built in best friend, born just a few months before her.

weddingParty.name: Kurt Cardey
weddingParty.description: Kurt is Maddie’s cousin Elizabeth’s husband and works as a mechanic.

weddingParty.name: Taylor Bergan
weddingParty.description: Taylor is Nick’s twin sister. She studied Animal Science at Iowa State University with a focus on horses.

weddingParty.name: Quentin Kelso
weddingParty.description: Quentin is Nick’s friend and coworker at Vermeer.

weddingParty.name: Emily Curry
weddingParty.description: Emily is Nick’s older sister and serves in the Colorado Army National Guard alongside her husband, Ben.

weddingParty.name: Sam Bergan
weddingParty.description: Sam is Nick’s older brother, a music teacher, and proud dad to flower girl Nori.

weddingParty.name: Mary McGovern
weddingParty.description: Mary is Maddie’s sister in law. Mary loves to travel, and Maddie actually got to meet Mary on a trip to Dubai.

weddingParty.name: Damien McGovern
weddingParty.description: Damien is Maddie’s oldest brother, a former Marine, and now an engineer at Lockheed Martin.

weddingParty.name: Toph McGovern
weddingParty.description: Toph is Maddie’s youngest sibling who loves horror movies, video games, and Nicki Minaj.

weddingParty.name: Henry Hayes
weddingParty.description: Henry and Nick met through Iowa State Power Pullers on the software and electrical teams.

weddingParty.name: Kay McGovern
weddingParty.description: Kay is Maddie’s younger sibling and proud pet parent to 3 dogs and 1 very spoiled cat.

weddingParty.name: John Anderson
weddingParty.description: John and Nick met in Iowa State Power Pullers while working on the electrical team together.
